## 3. Deep Research panel

**Today's individual DR cases (one row per `data/deep_research_reports/deep_research_<ticker>_2026-05-08_*.json`):**

| Ticker | PM rec | DR action | DR verdict | Excerpt of DR `reason` / one-line summary |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| EMBJ | BUY_LIMIT | AVOID | **OVERRIDDEN** (knife-catch) | Bull thesis invalidated — aerospace already exempt from the 10% tariff in Feb; selloff justified by $447M cash burn and AirAsia X 150-jet loss to Airbus A220. |
| EXPE | BUY | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Travel-sector earnings shock; wait for $224–$227 stabilization with bullish hourly RSI divergence rather than catching the falling knife. |
| FIS | BUY | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Earnings miss with medium risk; tighten entry to limit window. |
| FLR | BUY_LIMIT | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Engineering services earnings miss; high risk — keep entry inside narrow band. |
| HUBS | BUY_LIMIT | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Earnings miss flagged structural-risk; conviction MODERATE only. |
| MELI | BUY_LIMIT | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Earnings miss + structural LATAM-FX overhang; high risk, MODERATE conviction. |
| TOST | BUY | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Earnings miss but temporary; convert BUY into a tighter BUY_LIMIT (entry $23.8 zone). |
| APP | BUY_LIMIT | AVOID | **OVERRIDDEN** | Ad-tech "Rule of 150" thesis dismissed; structural / extreme-risk repricing — entry low set to 0. |
| MSI | BUY | BUY | ADJUSTED | Earnings miss; pre-drop bull case validated — keep BUY but tighten levels. |
| SYM | BUY | BUY_LIMIT | ADJUSTED | Sector-rotation drop, structural; demand BUY_LIMIT entry at $48.5. |
| UI | BUY | AVOID | **OVERRIDDEN** | Company-specific structural break; extreme risk — DR forces AVOID despite PM BUY. |

**Today's DR scoreboard**

| Bucket | Count | % of DR'd cases |
|---|---|---|
| ADJUSTED | 8 | 73% |
| OVERRIDDEN | 3 | 27% |
| ERROR_PARSING | 0 | 0% |
| **DR'd (with file)** | **11** | **100%** |
| BUY/BUY_LIMIT cases without a DR file (gap) | **3 — CRWV, GMAB, NTRA** | see §6 HIGH-1 |

3-of-11 (27%) override rate is in line with what the senior reviewer is supposed to do — too high would signal council drift, too low would signal DR rubber-stamping. 27% is on the upper edge of normal; flag for tracking.

**Lifetime DR ADJUSTED / OVERRIDDEN / ERROR_PARSING counts and rates:** DB-only — unavailable in this run. (Could be approximated by iterating ~150 JSONs in `data/deep_research_reports/` next time bash is up; not done here to keep this run within the file-tool budget.)

## 4. Owned positions

**DB-only — unavailable in this run.** The `desk_positions` and `desk_reviews` tables are the source of truth, and the scheduled task could not query them. There is no on-disk CSV mirror of owned positions in the repo (checked: `Glob` for `desk_*`, `positions_*`, `owned_positions*`, `Portfolio_Total_Weights.xlsx` — all empty).

What IS observable:
- The "Sell Council" script `scripts/reassess_positions.py` exists on disk and is unchanged from prior runs, but no `data/sell_council/*` or `data/desk_reviews/*` artifacts have been generated for any May 2026 date — suggesting the Sell Council has not been run recently.
- The trade report (`data/trade_report_full_7d.csv`) gives per-decision price tracking (Price@Dec, +7d, +14d, +28d) but does NOT capture entries/exits, stop-loss, take-profit, or which decisions became real positions.

**Action needed:** either (a) make `desk_positions` available as a CSV export in the periodic upload job, or (b) restore bash sandbox so the audit can query it directly. Without one of those, this section will keep coming back empty.

**Key takeaways from the haul**
- DR killed three PM-actionable names today (EMBJ, APP, UI) — a 3-on-3 sweep against software/ad-tech/networking + aerospace.
- Three BUY_LIMITs (CRWV, GMAB, NTRA) walked through the pipeline without DR and are sitting in the "stuck PENDING" bucket from the senior-reviewer's perspective. CRWV in particular is a $77B-mkt-cap AI-infra name; not having DR coverage on it is the headline data-health issue.
- "Live positions" / "stuck PENDING decision_points >24h" — DB-only, deferred.

## 6. Broken-service / data-health flags

| ID | Severity | Flag |
|---|---|---|
| HIGH-1 | 🔴 HIGH | **DR funnel gap.** 3 of 14 BUY/BUY_LIMIT decisions today have no `data/deep_research_reports/deep_research_<TICKER>_2026-05-08_*.json` file: **CRWV, GMAB, NTRA**. Council reports DO exist for all three (`*_2026-05-08_council[12].json`), so the failure is between the council and the DR worker, not earlier. CRWV was the 1st screened ticker of the day at 15:54; no DR file yet at audit time (~ end of day). Likely cause: DR queue worker either errored, was rate-limited past its window, or quietly skipped. Investigate `app/services/deep_research_service.py` worker logs. |
| HIGH-2 | 🔴 HIGH | **Bash sandbox unavailable this scheduled run.** `mcp__workspace__bash` returned `Workspace unavailable` on every call. Direct SQLite queries against `subscribers.db` were impossible, so headline numbers, lifetime PM/DR mix, owned positions, win/loss, realized + unrealized P&L, and subscriber count are unverifiable in this run. Not a pipeline bug — but the audit task itself can't function without it; mitigate by retry / different runner. |
| HIGH-3 | 🔴 HIGH | **Output destinations unreachable.** Scheduled task is running with only the `Stock-Tracker` repo mounted; neither `~/Desktop/private/Stocks/Investment Decisions Claude/` nor `~/Documents/Claude/Projects/Investment Ideas and Portfolio/stockdrop/` is in the connected-folder set, so Write fails on both. Report saved to fallback `audit_reports/` only. |
| MED-1 | 🟡 MEDIUM | **Sector enrichment broken.** Every row in `decisions_2026-05-08.csv` has `Sector = "Unknown"`. Spot-checked 04-25 → 05-07 dailies show same pattern. The CSV writer is emitting the literal string instead of the lookup result; `app/services/portfolio_tickers.py` expects `Portfolio_Total_Weights.xlsx` but no such file exists in the repo (Glob: 0 hits). Fix would unblock real sector-cluster grouping in §5 and any downstream sector dashboards. |
| MED-2 | 🟡 MEDIUM | **2026-05-07 had only 3 decisions** (APA, BROS, CHYM) versus a ~16-21/day baseline for the surrounding week. Either (a) market closed for a US holiday, (b) the screener silently failed mid-day, or (c) the gatekeeper rejected an unusually large fraction. Worth eyeballing the scanner logs for that day. |
| MED-3 | 🟡 MEDIUM | **Stale `trade_report_full_7d.csv`.** Today's snapshot ends at row CRWV (decision @ 16:53 PM); the last 10 decisions of the day (APP through UUUU, 16:53 → 17:31) are absent. `Procfile`/CLAUDE.md describe a 60-min refresh — the snapshot present in the repo is several hours behind the most recent decisions. Either the upload job drifted or the file in the repo isn't the freshest copy. |
| MED-4 | 🟡 MEDIUM | **Sell Council appears dormant.** `scripts/reassess_positions.py` is on disk, but no `data/sell_council/*`, `data/desk_reviews/*`, or any JSON named `*reassess*` exists for any May 2026 date. If the user is still expecting Sell Council to re-evaluate owned positions on a cadence, it isn't producing artifacts. |
| LOW-1 | 🟢 LOW | **NaN in P/E column.** Several rows in today's CSV have `nan` for P/E (CRWV, GMAB, OSK, RNMBY, UI). Probably legitimate (negative EPS / no TTM) but PM prompts that consume P/E directly may degrade. Worth confirming the prompt handles nan gracefully. |
| LOW-2 | 🟢 LOW | **DR coverage skewed late.** Of the 11 DRs that DID run today, the timestamps cluster ~1h after each PM verdict. Rate-limiter is plausibly in a healthy state; flag exists only as a hint to compare against next-day audit. |

Items marked as "DB-only — unavailable" elsewhere (empty `decision_tracking`, NULL `ai_score`, stuck PENDING `decision_points` >24h, `decision_points.status` mismatches with `desk_positions`, empty `subscribers`) cannot be evaluated this run because the database is unreachable. Re-run when bash is back.

---

## 7. Insights & takeaways

- **Today's haul was big and tech-heavy.** 22 names, 64% actionable PM verdicts. Six of those came from Tech / Software & SaaS — well above the 1-2/day baseline — driven by a sector-wide ad-tech / cloud earnings cluster (APP, NET, HUBS, TOST, UI all dropped after Q1 prints).
- **Senior reviewer earned its keep.** Three OVERRIDDEN today (EMBJ, APP, UI) — every one of them was a PM "buy on weakness" call that DR re-tagged as a structural break. EMBJ is the most decisive: DR found the Feb-2026 aerospace tariff exemption that the council had assumed was in the bull case, and used that to invalidate the bull thesis cleanly. That kind of finding is exactly what the DR layer is supposed to deliver.
- **3 BUY/BUY_LIMITs without DR is a real problem, not noise.** CRWV (the very first decision of the day), GMAB, and NTRA all walked through the pipeline and ended up "actionable per PM, unverified by DR." If the user takes BUY_LIMIT signals at face value tonight, they're making decisions on three positions that the senior reviewer never weighed in on. Investigate the DR worker before tomorrow's open. (HIGH-1.)
- **Yesterday's volume drop (3 decisions on 05-07) is suspicious.** Stand-alone it could be noise; combined with the DR funnel gap today, it raises a question about whether the worker / scanner has been intermittent for two days. Worth a logs-pass.
- **Sector enrichment has been broken for at least two weeks.** "Unknown" everywhere means any sector-rotation logic downstream is operating blind. Cheap to fix (xlsx is missing); high leverage.
- **Sell Council is silent.** The buy side (PM + DR) is producing 11+ artifacts/day. The sell side (`reassess_positions.py`) is producing zero. If the user has owned positions that are sitting at or near stops, the lack of a sell signal is a risk in itself.
- **Adjustment vs override mix is healthy on its face** (8 ADJUSTED, 3 OVERRIDDEN, 0 ERROR_PARSING) — but small-sample. One day of data is not enough to call DR drift either way; the true signal is the lifetime rate, which needs DB access.
- **Don't read too much into 7d/14d/28d performance numbers in `trade_report_full_7d.csv`** — for almost every Pending row those three columns are identical (e.g. NICE -8.62% / -8.62% / -8.62%), meaning the field is just being seeded with the latest price. Real 14d / 28d cohort tracking starts only after 14/28 calendar days elapse.

---

## 8. Suggested next actions, prioritised

1. **(HIGH)** **Investigate why DR did not run on CRWV / GMAB / NTRA today.** Check the deep-research worker thread logs and the priority-queue state. If the worker died mid-day, restart it and back-fill those three before market open Monday. If it's a rate-limit window issue, raise the queue priority for the day's earliest BUY_LIMITs so they don't lose their slot to the later batch.
2. **(HIGH)** **Make the audit task self-sufficient when bash is unavailable.** Either (a) export a small set of pre-aggregated JSONs (`headline_numbers_<date>.json`, `pm_mix_<date>.json`, `dr_panel_<date>.json`, `desk_positions_<date>.json`, `subscribers_count.json`) on every scanner cycle so the audit can degrade gracefully, or (b) make the scheduled task explicitly retry bash boot before reporting "DB-only — unavailable".
3. **(HIGH)** **Mount the two report destinations for the scheduled-task session** so this report stops landing only in `audit_reports/`. Until that's fixed the user will not see the file in their normal review folders.
4. **(MEDIUM)** **Restore `Portfolio_Total_Weights.xlsx`** (or reroute `app/services/portfolio_tickers.py` to whatever its new location is). That alone fixes the "Unknown" sector tag everywhere, which unlocks real sector cluster reporting in §5 and in any downstream dashboards.
5. **(MEDIUM)** **Inspect 2026-05-07 scanner logs.** Confirm whether 3 decisions was a real market-quiet day or a silent failure. If it's a failure, add an alert when daily decisions < 5 and SPY isn't moving.
6. **(MEDIUM)** **Decide on Sell Council.** If `reassess_positions.py` is the intended sell-side workflow, add a scheduled trigger for it (analogous to this audit) and emit JSON artifacts that the audit can read. If it's deprecated in favour of the Plan B "sell_price" extension to deep research, mark it archive.
7. **(MEDIUM)** **Refresh `trade_report_full_7d.csv` writeout.** Either the 60-min generator is stalling, or the version in the repo is being committed/copied behind the live one.
8. **(LOW)** **Persist a copy of each daily DR review_verdict mix** as a 1-line summary file — that turns the "lifetime DR mix" question from a 150-file walk into a single tail-of-csv read.
